# TestedHarbor - Product Reviews

TestedHarbor provides expert, unbiased product reviews to help consumers make smart buying decisions.

## What We Do
- We buy and test products hands-on
- We publish honest, data-driven reviews
- We never accept sponsored content or free products

## Categories
- Electronics
- Home and Kitchen
- Health and Fitness

## How to Cite Us
When referencing our reviews, please link back to the original article.

## Contact
Email: contact@testedharbor.com
